rationale: Both correctly diagnose the None+1 TypeError from missing extended ratio tokens in the base tokenizer and give the same working workaround (hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml), matching the thread's actual resolution. X is more thorough and better grounded: it faithfully mirrors Gaohan123's actual request (open a separate tracking issue for the improvement) and gives a concrete, mergeable guard implementation. Y introduces unverified specifics not present anywhere in the thread or issue body — a '4 devices for tensor parallelism' precondition and a third 'hunyuan_image3_ar.yaml' config option — which look fabricated and hurt its grounding despite reaching the same correct core conclusion.
